chapter_title: About Greeting One's Wife, Mahram Women,

hadith_entries.text:
437. Narrated Umm Hani bint Abu-Taleb (may Allah be
pleased with her): 'I went to Allah's Messenger in the year
of the conquest of Mecca and found him taking a bath while
Fatima (may Allah be pleased with her) was screening him.
The Prophet asked: "Who is it?" I replied: "I am Umm
Hani." (Bukhari)
بْنِ
بْنِ
passed

438. Narrated Asma'a bint Yazeed: 'The Prophet
by a group of women in the mosque and he signaled by the
hand (to greet them).' Abdul-Hameed, one of the narrators
gestured with his hand while narrating this. (At-Termizi)
